segments.text: Wow, it's so fantastic in here. You are amazing. How are y'all doing this morning?
I can hear you. There we go. It is so great to be with you here in Poland at B. What a wonderful
occasion we had together this morning. Today I get to introduce a few of my favorite people
and shift from what has been happening this morning where we have learned about our foundation
of who we are at doTERRA and who we've become at doTERRA. And now, I'm going to be here to
doTERRA. Are you anxious to get into product? Alright, so am I. Today, to help you understand
how important Europe is to doTERRA, I just wish to explain something. Normally, when we
go to conventions all around the world, we bring one medical doctor. To Europe, we brought
a lot of people. Today, you are going to hear from Dr. Scott Johnson. Dr. Johnson is a doctor
of naturopathy, and he is doTERRA's secret weapon. I think you all know him, but his understanding
of the chemistry of essential oils is profound. He has published over three dozen books, with
many in this space. He is a world-renowned expert in essential oils, and you have the opportunity
to learn from him this morning and talk with him this weekend. Are you excited about that?
Also, we have brought Dr. Alexandre Nietzsche. You know what I mean?
Dr. Nietzsche is another secret weapon at doTERRA, and especially here in Europe. In fact, I think
we need to take her with us elsewhere in the world. Would you mind if we borrowed her from
time to time to time? Would that be okay? No? No? You don't want to share? I understand.
Dr. Nietzsche is an incredible woman with an incredible background. She is a lieutenant colonel
in her country's military. She is going to be a general officer this year. She is board-certified
in general medicine. She has worked in anesthesia, board-certified in diet medicine. She has a
deep understanding of essential oils and uses them every day in her practice. And how many
of you are excited to hear from her this morning? Thank you. Now, I can't help but want to tell
you a little secret. Can you deal with one little secret to begin? Today, this morning, we are
going to be launching two products unique to Europe. Only in Europe. You are the only people
that will be found. You are going to be launched momentarily, and I look forward to seeing these
products and how you use them here in Europe to help the world heal and impact the world around
you for good. Now, on a personal level, I wish to thank you, and we wish to thank you for everything
you are doing to build doTERRA. You are incredible. As a group of people, you are doing amazing things.
And we want you to understand that on the executive team back at doTERRA, we see you. We see what
you are doing every day. And it is absolutely inspiring. Now, let's do some products. Sound good?
Thank you.
Thank you.
